profile.name: Andrian Nur Prabawa, S.E., M.M., CDMS
profile.biography: Ahli Muda Perencanaan Strategis @ PT Kertas Padalarang (Perum Peruri Group) | Certified Digital Marketing Specialist | BNSP Assessor & Auditor | Academic Tutor

posts.caption: Leading corporate digital transformation projects for Specialty Paper. Proud to receive the Gold Medal at PERURI Innovation Award 2024! 🏆✨ #innovation #corporate #business #digitaltransformation

Graduated with a Master's Degree in Management (M.M.) from Universitas Jenderal Achmad Yani. Grateful for the journey and ready for the next strategic challenges. 🎓💼 #masterofmanagement #graduation #achievement #highereducation

Officially certified as a BNSP Competency Assessor in Retail & Digital Marketing. Excited to assess and certify the next generation of marketing professionals! 📋📈 #bnsp #assessor #digitalmarketing #certification

Co-authored the academic book "Pengantar Sistem Informasi Manajemen". An effort to bridge academic theories with practical enterprise management systems. 📚💻 #sim #management #academic #author #publishing

Strategic planning session with PT Kertas Padalarang counterpart team. Formulating the corporate roadmaps and RJPP (Long-Term Corporate Plan) for 2026-2030. 🗺️📊 #strategicplanning #corporate #peruri #roadmaps
Certified Secure Computer User (CSCU) by EC-Council. In the digital age, cybersecurity awareness is a vital element of strategic corporate governance. 🔒💻 #cybersecurity #cscu #eccouncil #leadership

reels.caption: Quick breakdown of the Technology Acceptance Model (TAM) for digital stamp duty. Highlighting our findings from the published MSEJ journal paper! 🎥📊 #reels #management #research #learning #tam
3 key tips for aligning Corporate KPIs across directorates, VPs, and departmental levels. Strategic Management 101. 💡📋 #kpi #corporate #strategy #reelsinstagram
